revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with ' {{documentation|Template:Plainlist/doc}} '
Protected Template:Endplainlist: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Changed protection level of Template:Endplainlist: Change to template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
fix lint
Removed protection from "[[Template:Endplainlist]]": Already cascade protected, for consistency
Protected "[[Template:Endplainlist]]": Oops ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Endplainlist]]
5 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Endplainlist]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Bump-01-18]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove [[en:...]] and [[sn:...]] interwiki links
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Copying from [[Category:Bump-01-18]] to [[Category:reimport]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
